short_name: Visualizing Brain Proteinopathies Using [F-18]Flornaptitril-PET in the Prediction of Clinical Progression of Mild Cognitive Impairment With Either Suspected Chronic Traumatic Encephalopathy or Alzheimer's Disease
title: Visualizing Brain Proteinopathies Using [F-18]Flornaptitril-PET in the Prediction of Clinical Progression of Mild Cognitive Impairment With Either Suspected Chronic Traumatic Encephalopathy or Alzheimer's Disease

skipped_criteria: Diagnosis of MCI due to suspected CTE (age >45) or AD (age >50): conditional age thresholds based on diagnosis type cannot be expressed with available schema fields.
Participants must have a trial partner with frequent interaction (>3-4 times/week): no schema field for social/caregiver support.
Informed consent from participant or legally acceptable representative: no schema field for consent capacity.
Female participants must be surgically sterilized or post-menopausal or have a negative serum pregnancy test: partial pregnancy exclusion encoded; menopausal/sterilization status not in schema.
Willingness to comply with trial procedures, communicate with trial personnel, and undergo longitudinal follow-up: no schema field for patient willingness.
CDR global score of 0.5: no schema field for Clinical Dementia Rating.

Diagnostic criteria for possible traumatic encephalopathy syndrome (symptom persistence >2 years, repetitive head trauma, progressive course, delayed onset, cognitive/behavioral/motor features): no schema fields for these clinical diagnoses.
Diagnosis of MCI due to suspected AD per NIA-AA guidelines: no schema field for AD diagnosis.
Documented memory decline with gradual onset for at least 1 year: no schema field for longitudinal cognitive history.
MMSE-2 score of 22-30 (inclusive) at Screening Visit: no schema field for MMSE score.
Biomarker positive based on predefined plasma p-tau cutoff: no schema field for biomarker lab values.
Modified Hachinski Ischemic Score <4: no schema field for this score.
Cognitive deficits not occurring exclusively in context of delirium: no schema field for delirium status.
Cognitive deficits not better explained by another mental disorder or medical condition: no schema field for psychiatric/medical history.
Stable dosage of AchEI and/or memantine for at least 4 months prior to Screening Visit: no schema field for medication history.

Healthy volunteer inclusion criteria (medically healthy, age within 3 years of MCI participants, no cognitive impairment, no first-degree family history of early-onset AD, MMSE-2 ≥27): no schema fields for health status, relative age matching, cognitive assessment, or family history.
Breastfeeding exclusion: no schema field for breastfeeding status.
Unable to remain still for imaging or intolerance of neuropsychological/PET scan studies: no schema field for imaging tolerance.
History of stroke, TIA, seizures, or head/neck conditions within 12 months affecting circulation or image interpretation: no schema field for medical history or temporal conditions.
Preexisting major neurologic or physical illness (e.g., multiple sclerosis, diabetes, cancer): no schema field for comorbid conditions.
Psychiatric disorder (mania, schizophrenia, anxiety, depression with GDS ≥10) interfering with trial procedures: no schema field for psychiatric diagnoses or GDS score.
Condition or circumstance interfering with data collection quality: no schema field for this investigator judgment.
History of significant prescription/non-prescription drug or alcohol abuse: no schema field for substance abuse history.
Previously received F-18 FNT or any investigational product within past 30 days: no schema field for prior investigational drug exposure.
History of allergic reactions to albumin, or severe anemia or cardiac failure: no schema field for allergy or cardiac failure history.
Diastolic BP >100 mmHg exclusion: no schema field for diastolic blood pressure.
Any use of benzodiazepines within 24 hours prior to all trial visits: no schema field for recent medication use.
Plan to take ibuprofen or naproxen within 5 days before PET scan: no schema field for planned medication use.
Received radioactive drugs or scans within previous month or 10 half-lives: no schema field for prior imaging/radioactive drug exposure.
Implants contraindicated for MRI or history of claustrophobia in MRI: no schema field for implant status or claustrophobia.
History of CT/MRI findings such as mass lesions or brain infection unrelated to trial: no schema field for prior imaging findings.
Participated in another clinical trial for investigational agent within 90 days: no schema field for prior trial participation.
Monoclonal antibody treatment within previous 180 days: no schema field for prior biologic treatment.
Plan to receive aducanumab, lecanemab, or other approved Early AD treatments during trial: no schema field for planned treatments.
